explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 4 from a base nutrition score of 13. Context dragged it down by 9 points.

topPros.title: cheap and convenient
topPros.explanation: Very easy to use as a quick meal component.

topPros.title: still keeps some fibre
topPros.explanation: Not completely nutritionally empty despite the weaker category fit.

topPros.title: has practical comfort-food appeal
topPros.explanation: People actually eat it, which matters in the real world.

topCons.title: added sugar is a major category problem
topCons.explanation: Legumes are supposed to win on slow-carb behaviour, and this pushes the opposite way.

topCons.title: processing drags the category fit down
topCons.explanation: The canned sweet-sauce format makes it a worse version of what legumes are supposed to be.

topCons.title: weak protein usefulness for a legume
topCons.explanation: It does not deliver the strong fibre-plus-protein combo that defines elite legumes.
